home.categoriesTitle: Choose the category that suits you

home.mapTitle: Find the right vehicle for you
home.mapDesc: Enable location and see the nearest rental points. Click on a company to view available vehicles.
home.howTitle: Just 3 steps to get your car
home.howStep1Desc: Compare prices, categories and features. Filter by city and date.
home.howStep2Desc: Pay by card, PayPal, bank transfer or on-site. Transparent pricing, no surprises.
home.howStep3Desc: Instant confirmation. Pick up the car on your chosen day and enjoy the ride.
home.trustTitle: Guarantees and transparency at every step
home.trustSecureDesc: SSL 256-bit, Stripe PCI DSS Level 1. Your card details never touch our servers.
home.trustVerifiedDesc: Every partner company goes through an approval process. Licenses verified with Stripe Identity (OCR + face match).
home.trustPrivacyDesc: Fully GDPR-compliant. Delete your account and all your data in one click.
home.trustSupportDesc: Virtual assistant 24/7 + human team during the day. Replies within 2 hours on business days.
home.b2bTitle: Do you have cars for rent?
home.b2bDesc: Join dozens of companies across Kosovo, Albania and Macedonia. No upfront cost, full dashboard, payments directly to your account.
home.testimonialsTitle: Thousands of satisfied customers in the Balkans
home.testimonialDemo1: Transparent prices, no surprises at checkout. The cars were clean and on time.
home.testimonialDemo2: Fastest booking experience in the Balkans. Booked in 2 minutes from my phone.
home.testimonialDemo3: Companies are professional. My license was verified online — zero paperwork.
home.faqQ1: How far in advance should I book?
home.faqA1: You can book up to 2 hours before pickup, but for better availability we recommend 24-48 hours ahead.
home.faqQ2: What documents do I need to pick up the car?
home.faqA2: Valid driving license (min. 2 years), ID or passport, and a credit card for deposit (when paying cash).
home.faqQ3: Are there hidden costs or extra fees?
home.faqA3: No. The price you see in search is what you pay — taxes, roadside assistance and basic insurance are included.
home.faqA4: Yes. Free cancellation until 24h before pickup. After that the company policy applies (usually 50% of the total).
home.faqQ5: How do I pay — card or on-site?
home.faqA5: Both: card (Stripe), PayPal, bank transfer, or cash with deposit on-site. You choose at checkout.
home.faqQ6: Am I covered by insurance in case of an accident?
home.faqA6: Yes — the Basic plan covers most damages. For 100% coverage choose the Super Cover plan during booking.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to your trip
home.step1Desc: Find the perfect vehicle from hundreds of options
home.step3Desc: Get the keys and start the adventure
home.hiwTitle: Four simple steps to your vehicle
home.hiwDesc: From search to pickup, everything is done digitally.
home.hiwStep1Desc: Choose the location, date and type of vehicle you want. Advanced filters help you find the perfect car.
home.hiwStep2Desc: Fill in your details and book in seconds. The process is safe and fast.
home.hiwStep3Desc: The company confirms your booking within working hours. You will be notified immediately.
home.hiwStep4Desc: Show up at the designated location, sign the contract and start your trip.
home.tDesc: Thousands of clients trust us every day for their travels.
home.tText1: Outstanding service! The car was new, clean and the booking process was very easy. I recommend it to everyone.
home.tText2: The best prices I've found in the region. The company was professional and the car was exactly as in the picture. I will use it again.
home.tText3: I booked online from home and got the car in just 10 minutes. Excellent experience from start to finish.
home.ctaDesc: Join the leading platform in the region and manage your entire rental operation from one place.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Thousands of clients trust us every day
home.trustSupportDesc: Our team is always ready for you

cashHold.explanation: Amount will NOT be charged — only blocked as guarantee. After cash payment, the company releases it within 7 days with no real charge.
cashHold.formIntro: To confirm your booking with cash payment, we need a card as guarantee. No real charge — released after cash payment.

cashHoldModal.title: How does Cash Hold work?
cashHoldModal.subtitle: Automatic guarantee for cash payments
cashHoldModal.whatIsDesc: When a client books and chooses to pay "in person with cash", we ask for their card as guarantee. Stripe authorizes (does not charge!) an amount that stays blocked until you release it.
cashHoldModal.hotelAnalogy: 💡 Think of it like a hotel deposit: the hotel "reserves" an amount on the card at check-in but doesn't actually charge; releases it when the guest leaves without issues.
cashHoldModal.step1Desc: Enters card in Stripe — Stripe authorizes (not charges). Status: pending
cashHoldModal.step2Desc: As usual — booking goes to confirmed. Guarantee stays blocked.
cashHoldModal.step3Title: Client comes to pick up the vehicle
cashHoldModal.step3Desc: Pays remaining amount cash. Booking goes to active.
cashHoldModal.step4aDesc: Stripe cancels the authorization. Client is NOT charged. Their bank removes it from list within 1-5 days.
cashHoldModal.step4bDesc: If client did not show up or did not pay, you can capture the guarantee as penalty. Amount is actually charged.
cashHoldModal.releaseWhen3: Client changed mind and paid by card instead (then charge by card directly)
cashHoldModal.captureWhen1: Client did not show up without notice (no-show)
cashHoldModal.captureWhen3: Returned vehicle with damages outside coverage
cashHoldModal.timing1: Authorization stays valid for 7 days on client's card.
cashHoldModal.timing2: If you do not act within 7 days, Stripe expires it automatically and client is not charged.
cashHoldModal.timing3: You can capture less than the hold (e.g. from 100€ capture only 50€).
cashHoldModal.timing4: Client gets automatic email whenever status changes (authorized / released / captured).
cashHoldModal.faq1Q: What if the client uses a non-functional card?
cashHoldModal.faq1A: Stripe does not allow the authorization. The booking is not confirmed and the client must try another card or payment method.
cashHoldModal.faq2Q: Is any money charged when I press "Release"?
cashHoldModal.faq2A: No. Release is simply a cancellation of the authorization. The client loses nothing.
cashHoldModal.faq3A: As soon as possible after you realize the client breached terms. Ideally within 24-48 hours of the missed pickup. After 7 days the authorization expires and you cannot capture anymore.
cashHoldModal.faq4Q: How is the captured money calculated?
cashHoldModal.faq4A: Stripe transfers it to your Stripe account after deducting standard commission (1.4% + 0.25€ for European cards). View your commission in Stripe Dashboard.
